title: Johor Bahru RTS Link on track for 2026 completion
snippet: The Rapid Transit System (RTS) Link between Johor Bahru and Singapore is currently over 80% complete. This project is expected to carry 10,000 passengers per hour, significantly easing congestion at the CIQ.

title: Iskandar Rapid Transit (IRT) Phase 1 nearing operations
snippet: The Iskandar Rapid Transit (IRT) system is undergoing final trials. It will connect key areas of Johor Bahru including Horizon Hills and Mount Austin to the city center, providing a BRT alternative to private vehicles.

title: Severe CIQ traffic bottlenecks remain as JB population hits 1.5m
snippet: Despite infrastructure upgrades, Johor Bahru's rapid population growth to over 1.5 million in 2024 has led to daily gridlock at the CIQ. Commuters report wait times exceeding 3 hours during peak holiday periods.

title: Indonesian tourist vows not to visit JB again due to poor bus experience
snippet: An Indonesian tourist shared her bad experience at a Johor Bahru bus terminal, citing long delays, poor service, and rude staff. The incident highlights ongoing issues with terminal management and service quality in the city's transport hub.
